chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1255 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 12.03.2023, which is almost two and half years ago. In the last two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of almost two and half years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
